title: Wetter in Deutschland: „Es stehen uns die ersten größeren Gewittertage ins Haus“
description: Nach tagelanger Hitze schwingt in Deutschland das Wetter um: Für das Wochenende sagt der Deutsche Wetterdienst für viele Regionen Unwetter, kräftige Gewitter und Starkregen voraus.

en: Weather in Germany: “The first major thunderstorm days are upon us.” After days of heat, the weather in Germany is changing: the German Weather Service is predicting severe weather, strong thunderstorms and heavy rain for many regions over the weekend.

en: After heat: Storms cause numerous fire brigade operations. Fallen trees, full basements, interrupted events: thunderstorms and heavy rain caused many rescue services to be called out, especially in North Rhine-Westphalia and Lower Saxony.
